history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man stands leaning against a concrete wall covered in graffiti. He is wearing a dark navy blue hoodie with white lettering that appears to say "GAME" and dark wash, baggy jeans. He is looking down at his phone, which he holds in his right hand. The graffiti on the wall is abstract and colorful, with prominent purple and gray spray paint strokes, some of which are dripping down the wall. The lighting is dim, creating a gritty, urban atmosphere. The overall mood is casual and perhaps a bit melancholic. The image is shot from a slightly low angle, emphasizing the man and the graffiti. The color palette consists of dark blues, grays, purples, and white, with the concrete wall providing a neutral base. The style is realistic with a touch of street art aesthetic.
